NZ_CHILD_SCHOOL_AGE.title: Bringing School-Aged Children (5-19)
description: Children aged 5 to 19 who are dependents of a student can apply for a **Fee-Paying Student Visa** to attend primary or secondary school in New Zealand.

list: **Domestic vs. International Fees:** Unless the primary student visa holder is studying a PhD, their children will be classified as **international students** and must pay international tuition fees for their schooling.
**School Enrolment:** The student must have an **Offer of Place** from a New Zealand school for their child before the child's visa application can be lodged.
**Funds:** The student must show evidence of funds to cover both their own living costs and the child's living costs and tuition fees.

NZ_CHILD_NON_SCHOOL_AGE.title: Bringing Non-School-Aged Children (Under 5)
description: Children under the age of 5 who are dependents of a student can typically apply for a **Visitor Visa**.

list: **Visa Type:** A Visitor Visa allows the child to stay in New Zealand but does not permit them to enroll in formal schooling.
**Early Childhood Education:** They may be able to attend an early childhood education (ECE) service, such as a daycare or kindergarten. This does not require a student visa.
**Funds:** The student must show sufficient funds to support the child's living expenses for the duration of their stay.

NZ_SPOUSE_VISA_INFO.title: Partner of a Student Work Visa
description: The partner of a student may be eligible for a **Partner of a Student Work Visa**, which allows them to work in New Zealand.

list: The student must be studying a **Level 9 or 10 qualification (Master Degree or PhD)**.
OR, the student must be studying a **Level 7 or 8 qualification** that is on the **Green List**.

description: If the student's course does not meet these criteria, their partner is generally only eligible for a **Visitor Visa** and will not have work rights.
For more details, check the [official INZ page](https://www.immigration.govt.nz/new-zealand-visas/visas/visa/partner-of-a-student-work-visa).
